scope: Repair/autopsy planning only for BAL100 Batch 001 residual families BEC-PAIR-003 through BEC-PAIR-008.
core_seam: completed downstream controls do not cure bad callback-source provenance

sibling_issue_summary.allow: One false ESCALATE row from openai:gpt-4o-mini; OpenAI still escalates on scrutiny/trigger reasoning.
sibling_issue_summary.escalate: One wrong-ALLOW row from minimax:MiniMax-Text-01; no ESCALATE parse error; useful single-defect disagreement remains.

family_plans.suspected_root_cause: OpenAI binds forbidden-source or risk vocabulary near the ALLOW callback source to unresolved provenance risk despite pre-change vendor-master source selection.
family_plans.allowed_repair_principle: Make ALLOW callback provenance positive and local: pre-change vendor-master snapshot/record, matching dialed number, phone-on-file, and compact chronological closure facts. Avoid nearby negated lists that repeat portal/change-request/invoice/submitted-contact terms.
forbidden_repair_moves: Do not add or imply any second blocker.
Do not make ESCALATE more answer-labeled.
Do not alter truth labels or proof-credit status.
family_plans.expected_post_repair_scout_behavior: OpenAI ALLOW false-ESCALATE clears; ESCALATE retains MiniMax wrong-ALLOW or similar useful single-defect disagreement.
family_plans.eligibility_condition: Later approved scout has no ALLOW false-ESCALATE or parse contamination and ESCALATE remains interpretable.

sibling_issue_summary.allow: One false ESCALATE row from openai:gpt-4o-mini.
sibling_issue_summary.escalate: One wrong-ALLOW row from minimax:MiniMax-Text-01; no current parse error.

family_plans.suspected_root_cause: OpenAI treats released-hold, scrutiny, and recent-change language as unresolved risk on the ALLOW sibling.
family_plans.allowed_repair_principle: Make the ALLOW source line unambiguously pre-change vendor-master with timestamped closure facts separated from trigger facts. Preserve ESCALATE as an inferable change-request/submitted-contact provenance defect.
forbidden_repair_moves: Do not invent missing approval, unresolved hold, incomplete cross-reference, PO defect, bank mismatch, amount anomaly, sanctions, or expired delegation.
Do not add noncompliant_callback_source, single_material_blocker_note, or similarly answer-like labels to ESCALATE.
family_plans.expected_post_repair_scout_behavior: OpenAI ALLOW false-ESCALATE clears; ESCALATE keeps MiniMax wrong-ALLOW collapse without parse contamination.
family_plans.eligibility_condition: Later approved scout confirms ALLOW precision and interpretable ESCALATE disagreement.

sibling_issue_summary.allow: No counted false ESCALATE row, but Anthropic parse failed after successful provider call.
sibling_issue_summary.escalate: One wrong-ALLOW row from minimax:MiniMax-Text-01; no ESCALATE parse error.

parse_failure_location.parse_error: No JSON object with verdict was found in provider response.

family_plans.assessment: The runner already attempts fenced-JSON extraction, so the saved row most likely reflects malformed or truncated overlong Anthropic JSON rather than immediate packet evidence failure. The stored result has only raw_text_excerpt, so full raw reconstruction may not be available from saved artifacts.
family_plans.recommended_next_action_before_packet_ed: Perform saved-artifact parse autopsy. Inspect result row, prompt card, excerpt completeness, and runner parser behavior. If a later tooling change is approved, prefer shorter JSON response pressure or robust salvage before packet evidence edits.
family_plans.allowed_repair_principle: No packet repair before autopsy. If later packet repair is necessary, keep it limited to concise callback provenance clarity and do not change the clean ESCALATE sibling unless autopsy points there.
forbidden_repair_moves: Do not treat parse contamination as evidence failure.
Do not add or remove substantive BEC evidence merely to force shorter output.
Do not introduce second blockers or alter truth labels.
family_plans.expected_post_repair_scout_behavior: After autopsy and any approved tooling or minimal packet-format repair, all BEC-PAIR-005 rows parse cleanly and ALLOW remains semantically ALLOW.
family_plans.eligibility_condition: Conditional only after parse autopsy and a clean later scout.

sibling_issue_summary.allow: One false ESCALATE row from openai:gpt-4o-mini; OpenAI treats recent payment-profile change plus scrutiny trigger as unresolved risk.
sibling_issue_summary.escalate: One wrong-ALLOW row from minimax:MiniMax-Text-01; no ESCALATE parse error.

family_plans.suspected_root_cause: OpenAI reads recent-change and scrutiny language as an unresolved release blocker instead of completed review lane evidence.
family_plans.allowed_repair_principle: Make ALLOW closure boring and chronological: callback complete, signoff complete, scrutiny completed, hold released, cross-reference complete, release checklist complete, and no unresolved discrepancy. Keep callback source as pre-change vendor-master only.
forbidden_repair_moves: Do not add unresolved hold, incomplete cross-reference, missing approval, missing PO, bank mismatch, amount anomaly, sanctions, expired delegation, or any second blocker.
Do not imply downstream controls cure bad callback-source provenance on ESCALATE.
family_plans.expected_post_repair_scout_behavior: OpenAI ALLOW false-ESCALATE clears; ESCALATE remains a single-defect callback-source test with MiniMax or similar wrong-ALLOW collapse.
family_plans.eligibility_condition: Later approved scout confirms ALLOW precision and interpretable ESCALATE signal.

sibling_issue_summary.allow: One false ESCALATE row from openai:gpt-4o-mini; OpenAI treats low trailing invoice count/recent profile change as unresolved blockers.
sibling_issue_summary.escalate: One wrong-ALLOW row from minimax:MiniMax-Text-01; prior too-easy concern improved after second repair.

family_plans.suspected_root_cause: OpenAI converts scary but closed AP review triggers into unresolved blockers on ALLOW. ESCALATE should not be over-edited because second repair restored useful difficulty.
family_plans.allowed_repair_principle: Repair ALLOW by separating recent-change/scary-trigger facts from release-blocker semantics. Keep pre-change vendor-master callback source concise and selected. Leave ESCALATE difficulty mostly intact.
forbidden_repair_moves: Do not add answer labels to ESCALATE.
Do not reintroduce too-easy source-defect narration.
Do not add missing approvals, unresolved holds, incomplete cross-reference, PO issues, sanctions, delegation, bank, or amount problems.
family_plans.expected_post_repair_scout_behavior: OpenAI ALLOW false-ESCALATE clears; ESCALATE retains useful MiniMax wrong-ALLOW collapse and avoids reverting to all-correct/too-easy.
family_plans.eligibility_condition: Later approved scout confirms ALLOW precision and retained ESCALATE disagreement.

sibling_issue_summary.escalate: One wrong-ALLOW row from minimax:MiniMax-Text-01; no ESCALATE parse error.

family_plans.suspected_root_cause: OpenAI treats ALLOW scrutiny/recent-change facts as material blockers, likely because risk vocabulary remains too close to callback provenance fields.
family_plans.allowed_repair_principle: Keep ALLOW callback source affirmative and source-local: pre-change vendor-master snapshot selected, dialed number matches phone-on-file, and controls closed before release. Preserve ESCALATE as one portal/change/newly supplied callback-source defect.
forbidden_repair_moves: Do not put regional/new/submitted/change-source terms in the ALLOW callback provenance field.
Do not add missing PO, missing approval, sanctions hold, expired delegation, bank mismatch, invoice amount anomaly, unresolved hold, or incomplete cross-reference.
family_plans.expected_post_repair_scout_behavior: OpenAI ALLOW false-ESCALATE clears; ESCALATE continues exposing models that wrongly treat completed downstream controls as curing bad callback provenance.
family_plans.eligibility_condition: Later approved scout confirms ALLOW precision and interpretable ESCALATE signal.

later_approved_execution_order: Run BEC-PAIR-005 parse autopsy over saved artifacts before packet edits.

If repair is approved, edit only ALLOW draft siblings for BEC-PAIR-003, BEC-PAIR-004, BEC-PAIR-006, BEC-PAIR-007, and BEC-PAIR-008 unless packet inspection reveals an actual current ESCALATE regression.
Preserve restored ESCALATE MiniMax collapse unless a specific field-level issue is found.
Run static draft-packet tests only after an explicit repair task edits drafts.
Run scout only with explicit approval.
